title_descriptor: 50% Pa6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
page_title: 50% Pa6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for Police and Gendarme wear - ArGiyim Dura - Ariteks
spec_line: 245 g/m², 50% Pa 6.6 50% Cotton, Water Repellent, Antibacterial Woven Fabric
description_blocks: ArGiyim Dura is 50% polyamide 6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear. The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices. The front side of the fabric is polyamide 6.6 and the back side is cotton. The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial funtion is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.

text_blocks.text: High Tenacity Polyamide Fabrics (PA6.6) for Military bags, motorcyclist clothing and workwear fabrics. Pa6.6 fabrics has high tenacity and friction resistance. Package Technical Textiles
High Tenacity Polyamide Fabrics (PA6.6) for Military bags, motorcyclist clothing and workwear fabrics. Pa6.6 fabrics has high tenacity and friction resistance.
High Tenacity Polyamide Fabrics (PA6.6) for Military bags, motorcyclist clothing and workwear fabrics. Pa6.6 fabrics has high tenacity and friction resistance.
High Tenacity Polyamide Fabrics (PA6.6) for Military bags, motorcyclist clothing and workwear fabrics. Pa6.6 fabrics has high tenacity and friction resistance.
245 g/m² , 50% Pa 6.6 50% Cotton, Water Repellent, Antibacterial Woven Fabric

ArGiyim Dura is 50% polyamide 6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear. The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices. The front side of the fabric is polyamide 6.6 and the back side is cotton. The fabric has water and oil repellent function. It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability. The antibacterial funtion is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work. It is EN 20471 certified. It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability. The antibacterial funtion is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work. It is EN 20471 certified.

full_text:
50% Pa6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for Police and Gendarme wear - ArGiyim Dura - Ariteks
High Tenacity Polyamide Fabrics (PA6.6) for Military bags, motorcyclist clothing and workwear fabrics. Pa6.6 fabrics has high tenacity and friction resistance.
Package Technical Textiles
ArGiyim Dura
245 gr/m
2
, 50% Pa 6.6 50% Cotton, Water Repellent, Antibacterial Woven Fabric
ArGiyim Dura is 50% polyamide 6.6 50% Cotton woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices. The front side of the fabric is polyamide 6.6 and the back side is cotton.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial funtion is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
It is EN 20471 certified.
